title.en: Guehi could miss Norway game with hamstring injury
title.zh-CN: Guehi可能会因腿筋受伤而错过挪威比赛

summary.en: England defender Marc Guehi is managing a slight hamstring injury and could miss Saturday's Norway quarter-final.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰后卫马克·盖希（ Marc Guehi ）因轻微腿筋受伤，可能会错过周六的挪威四分之一决赛。

title.en: I've changed my mind, we might actually be able to win this thing - Shearer
title.zh-CN: 我改变主意了，我们可能真的能赢得这场比赛- Shearer

summary.en: Alan Shearer explains why he now has belief and confidence that England can go further in this World Cup than he thought.
summary.zh-CN: 艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么他现在相信英格兰可以在这届世界杯上走得比他想象的更远。

title.en: Norway's Haaland calls for media pressure on England before quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 挪威的哈兰德呼吁媒体在四分之一决赛前对英格兰施压

summary.en: Norway striker Erling Haaland says all the pressure is on England before the two sides' World Cup quarter-final on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 挪威前锋埃尔林·哈兰德表示，在周六双方的世界杯四分之一决赛之前，所有的压力都落在了英格兰身上。

title.en: How Kane and Haaland compare - who would you pick?

summary.en: Two of the world's best strikers - Harry Kane and Erling Haaland - meet in the World Cup quarter-finals - but who would you rather have?
summary.zh-CN: 世界上最好的两位前锋--哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）和埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ） --在世界杯四分之一决赛中相遇--但您更喜欢谁？

title.en: Has your area gone football mad? We've mapped World Cup viewing
title.zh-CN: 您所在的地区是否已经疯狂踢足球？我们绘制了观看世界杯的地图

summary.en: We've analysed BBC iPlayer viewing across the UK to see where the tournament has been most popular.
summary.zh-CN: 我们分析了英国各地的BBC iPlayer观看情况，以了解比赛最受欢迎的地方。

title.en: Late goals, comebacks and upsets - is record-breaking World Cup best ever?
title.zh-CN: 迟来的进球、复出和沮丧--破纪录的世界杯有史以来最好的吗？

summary.en: What a World Cup it has been with great goals, thrilling comebacks, late drama, shock results. But how will this tournament be remembered?
summary.zh-CN: 这是一届多么精彩的世界杯，有着伟大的进球、惊心动魄的复出、后期的戏剧、令人震惊的结果。但是这场比赛将如何被记住？

title.en: Idolises Ronaldo, plays like Saka - meet  £40m Chelsea winger Quenda
title.zh-CN: 偶像罗纳尔多，像萨卡一样打球-满足£ 4000万切尔西边锋昆达

summary.en: Chelsea's new signing Geovany Quenda hopes to follow in the footsteps of Cristiano Ronaldo by leaving Sporting's academy for the challenge and exposure of the Premier League.
summary.zh-CN: 切尔西新签下的乔瓦尼·昆达（ Geovany Quenda ）希望能够跟随克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的脚步，离开体育学院，迎接英超联赛的挑战和曝光。

title.en: Maddy Cusack inquest adjourned over evidence request
title.zh-CN: Maddy Cusack审讯因证据要求而延期

summary.en: Maddy Cusack died after being found unconscious at her family home in September 2023.
summary.zh-CN: Maddy Cusack于2023年9月在家中被发现昏迷不醒后去世。
